title: Silence pull log on podman build -q
body:
-q did not completely quiet

closes containers/podman#7401

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ashley-cui* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **vrothberg** You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @vrothberg` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
This will fix it only for Podman not for Buildah bud, and perhaps not for openshift embedding buildah code or any other platform that uses Buildah.  Perhaps not in podman-remote build
@rhatdan, ah didn't think of other places. we'll go with yours then.
